data.body: Epic 3006-e198 restructured for implementation-by-less-capable-agent (remediations 1-3 approved). Created 2 foundation children: amiss-bun-wince/baf7 (pure classify() + Decision matrix spec with anchor cells, per-binding baseline schema + seed, census + breaker, 5 named test files incl. frozen-census replay and multi-pass fault-injection) and soar-quill-flare/7d23 (4-phase rollout: dual-write shadow >=10 clean passes -> census/divergence alerting -> consumer swap w/ direction-preservation RED test -> capped live heal of the 7 instances; rollback = workflow mode input). Appended '## Implementation contract' sections to all 4 drift bugs (each names its Decision cells, exact helper functions to reuse vs not reimplement, RED tests, live acceptance cells, ADR prerequisites). Wired deps: 4 bugs depends_on baf7; 7d23 depends_on all 4 bugs — next-batch now yields exactly baf7. Set file-impact + verify-commands on all 6 children. Epic AC updated to name the 6-child execution order. All 7 tickets pass clarity/check-ac/quality gates; store validate clean for this epic.
